title: Loops Review 2025: Features, Pricing & Honest Verdict
meta_description: Is Loops worth it in 2025? We break down pricing, features, pros and cons so you can decide.
h1: Loops Review 2025: Everything You Need to Know
intro: Loops is email for modern saas companies that positions itself for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails. Founded in 2022, it has become one of the most recognised platforms in the email marketing space. In this review we cover what it does well, where it falls short, and who should actually use it.
verdict: Loops is a solid choice for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails. Its free tier is genuinely useful. The main trade-off is between its particular strengths and the limitations that make alternatives worth considering for some users.
pros: Good fit for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails
cons: Can get expensive at higher subscriber counts
Some features locked to higher tiers
pricing_summary: Loops offers a free plan, with paid plans from $49/month. Pricing typically scales with subscriber count.
best_for_detail: Loops works best for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails. If you fit that profile, the feature set aligns well.

faq.a: Yes, Loops has a free plan supporting up to 1000 subscribers.

faq.q: What is Loops best used for?
faq.a: Loops is best for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails. Its standout features include transactional email, automation, audience segmentation.

faq.q: Does Loops have an affiliate program?
faq.a: Loops does not currently offer an affiliate program.
